TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Don Adams‚Äé nalecuh i Royal Oak, Michigan, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput. Don Adams‚Äé i 1970 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 8 ku uwac atu silsil 120, namapili' tu nu San Diego Rockets putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 11 a bulad 27 a demiad, 1947 a mihcaan. Don Adams, u kawaw niza sa, u miunduay. mapatay tuway ciniza i 2013 a mihcaan, u uzip niza sa, enem a bataan izaw ku enem ku mihcaan.
S.PHON: don adams* nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒß i *ojar~…æ oak, mi ¶ƒßigan, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput. don adams* i **** a miƒß ¶aan nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ ***, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu san di…ôgo *o ¶k…ôts putiput. nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan ¶iniza i ** a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan. don adams, u kawaw niza sa, u miunduaj. mapataj tuwaj ¶iniza i **** a miƒß ¶aan, u uzip niza sa, …ôn…ôm a bataan izaw ku …ôn…ôm ku miƒß ¶aan.

Don Adams‚Äé i 1970 a mihcaan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 8 ku uwac atu silsil 120, namapili' tu nu San Diego Rockets putiput. nalecuhan ciniza i 11 a bulad 27 a demiad, 1947 a mihcaan. Don Adams, u kawaw niza sa, u miunduay. mapatay tuway ciniza i 2013 a mihcaan, u uzip niza sa, enem a bataan izaw ku enem ku mihcaan.
